title: Etched
description: A new form of entertainment. Create and play your very own records that everyone can hear!
body: # 💿 Etched, a new form of entertainment ![forge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/forge_vector.svg) Etched provides new ways to play your own music right in Minecraft! Not only can you create custom records with full customization with the new **Etching Table**, Etched also provides new ways to play all discs. The new **Album Jukebox** lets you store up to 9 records which will play in order and on repeat unless powered by redstone, which then it'll pause and reset to the first disc. The **Jukebox Minecart** lets you play music on the rails with the ability to insert records into it with hoppers or, if the song is ended, restart the song with an activator rail! ### 📦 Features: - The new bard profession for villagers with various musical trades. - New ways to play music such as the Jukebox Minecart, Album Jukebox, or Radio! Play songs on the go, live from a radio station, or multiple songs in order on repeat, just like an album. - Insert records into jukeboxes with hoppers! A parity feature from Bedrock. - Create your own custom records with the Etching Table! Provide a URL (supports SoundCloud, MP3, WAV, OGG, and Sound Events), a blank disc, and a label to decorate your disc.   ### 💽 How to create a disc: It's quite easy to do, simply insert a **Blank Music Disc** along with a **Music Label** (right click it to customize the song's info, color with dyes in a crafting table, and craft two dyed music labels together to create a **Complex Music Label**) and you'll be ready to create your first disc. Once you've got the necessary components, you can select the pattern of the label under the component slots to make your disc look pretty and the URL to your song goes in the bar above! Etched currently supports URLs that lead to an **MP3 File**, **WAV File**, **OGG File**, **SoundCloud Song** (GO+ songs are not supported, regardless of subscription status), **Bandcamp** Song, or a **Minecraft Sound Event**.    #### How do I obtain a Blank Music Disc? These wouldn't be records without some sort of challenge. To get a **Blank Music Disc**, you can either smelt a vanilla **Music Disc** or trade with the new **Bard** at merchant level 2.
